programme.title: Consejos de amiga
programme.desc: Niki le pide a su papá q deje su amante. Aníbal visita a Paula y le cuenta la verdad sobré Adriana. Victoria va a una estética con sus amigas y hacen confidencias. Jocelyn quiere q Victoria le preste Arriaga.

programme.title: Citas de guardaespaldas
programme.desc: Niki conoce a Paula y Guzmán le pide q la corra. Ella lo hace pero Paula se niega a renunciar. Niki le pide perdón a su mamá. Guzmán le revela a Niki su secreto. Jacelyn se quiere aprovechar de Arriaga. Victoria los espía.

programme.title: Psicóloga descubierta
programme.desc: Santino visita Beatriz y quiere ayudarla. Victoria destruye la pintura de Arriaga. Guillo muy grosero con su mamá. Guzmán enfrenta a Paula. Guzman descubre a Niki

programme.title: Fiesta sorpresa
programme.desc: Victoria reclama a Arriaga besar a Joselyn. Doris y Joselyn quieren organizar el cumpleaños de Victoria. Candelaria le promete a Cristina visitarla. Nelson hace una fiesta sorpresa para Victoria.

programme.title: Culpa de padres
programme.desc: Anibal sufre por creer q Candelaria murió. Guzmán se sincera con Niki. Paula le reclama a Aníbal por ser un mal padre. Salcero se encuentra con Beatriz en el baile. Kendra quiere ayudar a Nelson a comprar el regalo para Victoria.

programme.title: Frida
programme.desc: The most prominent female painter of Latin America, Frida Kahlo, is agonizing in her Coyoacán home. She evokes memories of her childhood, of the streetcar accident that caused her terrible pain and affliction, her friendship with Trotsky and painter Alfaro Siqueiros, her marriage to Diego Rivera, her miscarriage, her political commitment, her love affairs and the anticipated exhibition of her works.

programme.title: El embarazo de Federica
programme.desc: Ludoviquito le da a su madre un licuado verde (que es en realidad un limpia cañerías), causándole ascos, lo que hace pensar a todos que Federica esta nuevamente embarazada. Y todos sueñan como sería el bebé.

programme.title: Bibi es normal
programme.desc: Federica asusta a Bibi con un sartén para hacerle un test de oído; sin embargo se desmaya y de repente ven que se "vuelve normal" (en realidad se vuelve rebelde y excéntrica, lo que para la familia es normal). Ludovico, cansado del comportamiento de su hija, y tanto Junior como Ludoviquito de que no le preste atención, deciden hacer que tenga otro accidente para que vuelva a ser la de antes. No obstante, Federica la protege mucho de Ludovico ya que le gusta que Bibi sea (lo que ella considera) normal.

programme.title: El representante de Ludoviquito
programme.desc: Un productor quiere contratar a Ludoviquito para grabar comercial y los P. Luche harán todo porque así sea. Aunque sus padres discuten por quien debe su representante.

programme.title: La ex de Rocko
programme.desc: Rocko tiene contacto con una exnovia y Alejandra se pone celosa. Los Rivers llevan a Luisito Jr. a algunos cástines.

programme.title: Tomasa
programme.desc: Luis compra un dispositivo inteligente para controlar el departamento y lo presume con los Vecinos. Los López Pérez rifan un extraño cuadro.

programme.title: La cruda
programme.desc: Rocko y Alejandra bebieron demasiado la noche anterior y no recuerdan nada de lo que pasó, Rocko fue arrestado por el robo de artículos para bebes y Luisito Jr. dio sus primeros pasos impresionando a sus padres de la nueva etapa que comienza.

programme.title: Prueba de embarazo
programme.desc: Alejandra descubre que está embarazada, ¿cómo lo tomará la familia? Chris y su pareja han decidido adoptar a un bebé.

programme.title: Melena de Luis
programme.desc: Luis debe recurrir a remedios extremos para poder continuar con su labor de venta. Rocco está dispuesto a fugarse de la prisión.

programme.title: Foto familiar
programme.desc: El abuelo de Benito llega al edificio para tomarse la foto familiar. Germán encuentra a un equipo de niños con quien hacer la reta de fútbol.

programme.title: Abarrotes Don Arturo
programme.desc: Morris tiene la tarea de vender unos chocolates de la escuela y a su familia se les ocurre una idea. Lorena manda a arreglar la máquina de escribir de Frankie.

programme.title: Tapa calefactora
programme.desc: Germán intentará instalar una nueva tapa calefactora en el inodoro de don Hipólito. Mientras que, Vanessa probará un remedio contra las canas.

programme.title: Regalo perfecto
programme.desc: Luisito le da un regalo a Silvita por su cumpleanos, pero ella no lo esperaba. En tanto que, Calaco decide visitar a Rocco en su casa.

programme.title: Tendedero
programme.desc: Magdalena decides to put a clothesline in the middle of the corridors of the building and Luis will look for a way to remove it.

programme.title: Amigos
programme.desc: Silvia agrega a Luis al chat de la guardería y Germán recibe la visita de sus amigos comentaristas de TUDN que transmiten un partido desde la conserjería.

programme.title: Auto nuevo
programme.desc: Luis le compra un auto nuevo a Silvia para que pasee con Luisito Jr. y Morris le tiene una mala noticia a sus padres: no le gusta el rock.

programme.title: Tacos veganos
programme.desc: Virginia y Borre terminan su relacion y no conforme, ella decide iniciar su propio negocio de tacos veganos. Arturo se encuentra un billete de mil pesos.

programme.title: Ropa de paca
programme.desc: Jorjáis decide invertir en un negocio de ropa de paca y descubre que no está solo, tiene competencia. Silvia y Luis buscan sobrevivir al primer día de guardería de Luisito Jr.

programme.title: Silvia party loving
programme.desc: Karla, la sobrina de Silvia, la visita en su casa, y ella finge que tiene una actitud muy cool y se va de parranda con ella. Pedro se siente mal y no puede salir de su cuarto.

programme.title: Nano por un día
programme.desc: La guardería está cerrada y Silvia y Luis no tienen quién cuide a Luisito Jr., por lo que tendrán que elegir entre los vecinos. Hipólito, Pedro y Germán buscan hacer válida la garantía de un celular.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: El grupo de whats
programme.desc: Germán convoca a una junta vecinal, pero nadie asiste porque nadie vio el anuncio en el pizarrón, Jorjais les propone hacer un grupo de chat para enterarse de los acontecimientos en el edificio.

programme.title: El gas
programme.desc: Como es costumbre en el edificio, los vecinos no pagan la cuota del gas, y ante la negativa de todos, Luis decide poner su propio tanque estacionario ¡en la azotea!

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: Turkey Troubles

programme.title: Borderland Bucks Part 2
programme.desc: An action-filled hunt in Mexico leads to a surplus of venison, so locals teach the guys how to produce wild game tamales from scratch.

programme.title: Walking In The Clouds
programme.desc: Steve and his brother Danny endure miserable weather in the glaciated high country of the Alaska Range as they search for a Dall sheep ram.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Top of the Bottom of the World: New Zealand Thar Part 1
programme.desc: With the help of guide and friend Remi Warren, Steven Rinella gears up for a massive climb into New Zealand's Southern Alps in pursuit of Chamois and Tahr. The hunters will travel light and base out of an alpine hut to find animals Steve has never hunted. Things turns adventurous quickly; with an impassable glacial river between Steve and his goal. But with hard work, Steve experiences a do-it-yourself high country hunt like no other.

programme.title: MeatEater - Cooking Special: Giving Thanks
programme.desc: The Pilgrims didn't get their turkey at the store and neither does Steven Rinella. On this special Holiday episode Steve cooks three enticing dishes: Wild Turkey Galantine, Smoked Black Bear Ham, and his take on the traditional Mincemeat Pie. Appetites will run large as Steve makes a special meal for his family and friends.

programme.title: MeatEater - True North: Alaska North Slope Caribou
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and special guest, the author Tim Ferriss, travel to the remote north slope of Alaska.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Greatest Draw: Alaska Dall Sheep Part 1
programme.desc: After drawing one of the most coveted big game tags in North America, a Tok Management Area Dall sheep tag, Steven Rinella heads out for a truly rare and epic Alaskan experience. Along with his brother Danny and friend Paul, Steve is dropped deep into the Alaska Range. After a rugged hike through nasty weather, Steve's skills and fortitude are tested against his elusive, high-climbing quarry.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Greatest Draw: Alaska Dall Sheep Part 2
programme.desc: After drawing one of the most coveted big game tags in North America a Tok Management Area Dall sheep tag Steven Rinella heads out for a truly rare and epic Alaskan experience. Along with his brother Danny and friend Paul, Steve is dropped deep into the Alaska Range. After a rugged hike through nasty weather, Steve's skills and fortitude are tested against his elusive, high-climbing quarry.

programme.title: MeatEater - Sonoran Super-Birds: Mexico Gould's Turkey
programme.desc: Steven Rinella crosses the border into Mexico's desert to call in the Gould's wild turkey. Of the five turkey subspecies in North America, the Gould's is the largest but rarest. On this unique Mexican adventure, Steve finds exciting action for gobbling toms. With locally made charcoal at his disposal, he'll grill up a big, brined, delicious bird.

programme.title: MeatEater - Straight Flush: Montana Mountain Grouse
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his friend Ronny Boehme drive into the mountains of southwest Montana to hunt the high ridge tops for dusky grouse. Ronny's Bracco Italiano hunting dogs have been bred and trained for this work, but can Ronny handle the altitude? The duo prepares dusky grouse jalape√±o poppers and grouse fettuccine with a white wine and cream sauce.

programme.title: MeatEater - Meet the Meateaters: Montana Crew Muley Part 1
programme.desc: The goal on MeatEater has always been to make viewers feel like they're on a hunt with Steven Rinella, but on this two-part episode Rinella grants his viewers an all-access pass to see just how the MeatEater crew works together to make the show. Strap-in for some behind-the-scenes action.

programme.title: MeatEater - Meet the Meateaters: Montana Crew Muley Part 2
programme.desc: The goal on MeatEater has always been to make viewers feel like theyre on a hunt with Steven Rinella, but.

programme.title: MeatEater - First Timers: Montana Mule Deer Part 1
programme.desc: Television personality Joe Rogan and his best friend, comedian Bryan Callen, join Steven Rinella for their very first hunt. On a float trip for mule deer through the rugged Missouri Breaks, this is as adventurous of a first hunt as anyone could hope for, and Steve's special guests are in for a memorable experience and delicious wild game field cooking in some gorgeous country.

programme.title: MeatEater - First Timers: Montana Mule Deer Part 2
programme.desc: Television personality Joe Rogan and his best friend, comedian Bryan Callen, join Steven Rinella for their very first hunt. On a float trip for mule deer through the rugged Missouri Breaks, this is as adventurous of a first hunt as anyone could hope for, and Steve's special guests are in for a memorable experience and delicious wild game field cooking in some gorgeous country.

programme.title: MeatEater - Swamp Stew: Michigan Bowfishing
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to his cherished boyhood stomping grounds along Michigans Muskegon River.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Wide Open: New Mexico Antelope
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and friend Cody Lujan head to Northeastern New Mexico to hunt pronghorn antelope, the fastest big game animal in the United States. In the wide open desert plains, Steve will have to work hard to stalk within range of a mature buck. The payoff will be antelope loin topped with local New Mexico chiles.

programme.title: Offline with Jon Favreau (Breaking the Cycle of Political Violence)
programme.desc: Does political violence ever help a social cause? Zayd Ayers Dohrn, playwright and host of Crooked's "Mother Country Radicals," joins Offline to discuss the complicated legacy of radical activism in America. In his new book, Dangerous, Dirty, Violent, and Young, Zayd dives even deeper into the morally ambiguous decisions made by his parents...two founding members of the notorious Weather Underground. He and Jon contemplate what activist actions lead to mass alienation vs. adoption of ideals, why a generation of Americans gravitated towards political violence in the 1970s...and why it's happening again today.

programme.title: Pod Save America (The Bruised Hand in the Cookie Jar)
programme.desc: Trump's DOJ launches a $1.7 billion fund to make payments to his allies, as Democrats revive the debate about whether to make Trump's declining fitness—even his increasingly discolored hands—a campaign issue. Jon, Lovett, and Tommy weigh the pros and cons and react the rest of the news, including Trump taking revenge on Bill Cassidy and Thomas Massie, his new plotting against Cuba and Greenland, and the latest on negotiations with Iran.

programme.title: Keep It (The Colbert Necessities)
programme.desc: Louis Virtel is joined by Guy Branum to discuss the Canadian magic of Martin Short and his new documentary Marty, Life is Short. Then, Louis and Guy chat about The Late Show with Stephen Colbert ending and what that means for late night television. Plus, friend of the show Mandy Moore returns to chat pop music and her new movie The Breadwinner.

programme.title: Lovett or Leave It (Xi’s Just Not That Into You)
programme.desc: China blows smoke up Trump’s skirt, Rand Paul’s son gets hot under the collar, and Marco Rubio slips into something a little more comfortable. This week, Outlander star Sam Heughan and Lovett explore online fandom and only one survives. Hacks’ Caitlin Reilly sweeps us off our feet and into the distant past, and we all journey to cloud nine for a hilarious round of Second Thoughts.

programme.title: Lovett or Leave It (Look on Trump's works, ye Mighty, and despair!)
programme.desc: The president makes waves with his Reflecting Pool reno, the U.S. treads water on the Iran peace process, and Trump’s crypto golden calf is more than a little fishy. This week, rock legend Melissa Etheridge lets the lesbian good times roll. Speaking of roll, Bosco brings the magic while we rank the sexy monsters of Magic: The Gathering. And to close us out, Lovett serves up a piping hot round of Second Thoughts.

programme.title: Lovett or Leave It (We Bought a Ballroom)
programme.desc: Trump gives us a billion reasons to hate his ballroom, Kash Patel is drowning in leaks, and RFK Jr. will have to pry our pills from our cold, tan hands. Then Beck Bennett and Kyle Mooney tackle life's big questions and predict the next great Saturday Night Live host. And Lovett is on one when we take a look at our Second Thoughts.

programme.title: Lovett or Leave It (Spirit Gives Up the Ghost)
programme.desc: Trump flies by the seat of his pants, Pete Hegseth tries to land the plane on Iran, and Spirit Airlines touches down on that Great Big Tarmac in the sky. This week, rock legend Ann Wilson from Heart decides which pop singers have the pipes, Yamaneika Saunders shares her romantic gripes, and Lovett and his guests answer the question, “What about love?” And we raise a glass to a round of Second Thoughts.

programme.title: Lovett or Leave It (License to Kimmel)
programme.desc: We’re live from our brand new studio in Hollywood as Republicans take a spin around Trump’s ballroom, Melania goes UFC on ABC, and the Mentalist makes room on Jimmy Kimmel Live. Then Ron Funches joins to talk Traitors, Real Housewives and, of course, autism. Pen15’s Anna Konkle looks back at parenting, embarrassing childhood moments, and one really weird party at Salman Rushdie’s house.

programme.title: Little Angels Of The Night
programme.desc: When two blonde "call girls" are brutally murdered in Mrs. Dolly Smith's apartment building, Kelly and Kris reluctantly go undercover as prostitutes and move into Mrs. Smith's establishment. On their first day at work, the trio arouses suspicion with their clever tactics to avoid meeting with "customers." But the Angels are more interested in the Italian restaurant across the street, where Freddie, the macho delivery boy works. He brings pizza to the girls in the building almost every day, and always acts aggressive and threatening. Then Bonnie, another blond girl, is attacked but manages to escape. When she says her assailant smelled like a restaurant, it looks like Freddie is the man. Freddie swears he's innocent, and when his shark's tooth pendant is found beside the latest victim, Sabrina wonders if it isn't a bit too obvious a clue. The owner of the Italian restaurant, Roman Vail, also has access to the apartment building, and the. Angels are surprised to learn that he knows Freddie lost his pendant. Also the last victim died with bits of skin under her fingernails, and Vail's arms show many scratch marks. When Sabrina and Kelly finally put the evidence together, they must rush to rescue blond-haired Kris who is alone in the restaurant with Vail. Kate Jackson, Jaclyn Smith and Cheryl Ladd star as the Angels, Sabrina Duncan, Kelly Garrett and Kris Munroe, respectively, who work for Charlie, an unseen and very sophisticated boss who phones in their instructions. David Doyle stars as Bosley, Charlie's harried assistant.

programme.title: Jade Trap
programme.desc: Charlie uses the Angels plus his own priceless collection of jade as bait to trip up an acrobatic jewel thief and a killer in "THE JADE TRAP." Gigolo Denny Railsback murders wealthy Julie Redmond when she becomes disenchanted. As Denny is doing away with Julie in the living room, cat burglar Ted Machlin is in the bedroom stealing jewels. When Denny spots Ted, he makes it appear that the jewel thief is the murderer. The setting is a posh residential hotel into which Kelly checks as a lonely heiress, Kris as a Swedish movie star and Bosley as a flamboyant auctioneer. Sabrina does her sleuthing as a hotel employee. Kate Jackson, Jaclyn Smith and Cheryl Ladd star as the Angels, Sabrina Duncan, Kelly Garrett and Kris Munroe, respectively, who work for Charlie; an unseen and very sophisticated boss who phones in their instructions. David-Doyle stars as Bosley, Charlie's harried assistant.

programme.title: Angel on the Run
programme.desc: Larry Kantrelle delivers gravel in a dump truck, and he has more than a business relationship with several of his lady customers. One morning en route to see his favorite "customer," a small brown package is tossed into his truck by a pair of thugs in a Cadillac.

programme.title: Antique Angels
programme.desc: Two tanks of radioactive gas are stolen; and the tire track of a 1930's automobile is the Angels' only clue. Since there is an antique auto rally being held nearby, it makes sense to go there and see if anybody looks suspicious.

programme.title: Angels Come Home
programme.desc: At the Grand Prix, the Angels investigate an explosion in a garage. A man named Paul Ferrino tries to murder his old girlfriend Jill by having her drive an experimental car rigged with a bomb.

programme.title: The Sandcastle Murders
programme.desc: Sabrina, Kelly and Kris stalk the sands of Malibu Beach to track down the surfside killer of several young women in "Sandcastles Murders." Police have virtually no leads in their investigation of the "Sandcastle Murders." When one of the victims turns out to be a personal friend of Kris, boss Charlie give the girls permission to handle their own investigation. Kate Jackson, Jaclyn Smith and Cheryl Ladd star as the Angels, Sabrina Duncan, Kelly Garrett and Kris Munroe, respectively, who work for Charlie, an unseen and very sophisticated boss who phones in their instructions. David Doyle stars as Bosley, Charlie's harried assistant.

programme.title: Angel Blues
programme.desc: Stunned by the mysterious death of his favorite folk-rock singer, Charlie sends Kelly, Kris and Sabrina to find everyone who spent time with the victim the night she pied in "Angel Blues." Amy Waters is one of the most popular singers in the country. Shortly after freaking out during a concert performance, Amy calls her dad to say she's coming home by cab to "get straight." But Amy makes a few stops along the way. One of the last people to see her alive is Lenny, the taxi driver Kris becomes acquainted with during the investigation. Kate Jackson, Jaclyn Smith and Cheryl Ladd star as the Angels, Sabrina Duncan, Kelly Garrett and Kris Munroe, respectively, who work for Charlie, an unseen and very sophisticated boss who phones in their instructions. David Doyle stars as Bosley, Charlie's harried assistant.

programme.title: The Saucer Season
programme.desc: When handyman Eb (Tom Lester) reports he has seen little green men piloting flying saucers, everyone in Hooterville takes him at his word�even the Air Force�and soon the Douglas farm becomes the Roswell of the greater Pixley area!

programme.title: Kimball Gets Fired
programme.desc: Ralph (Mary Grace Canfield) is distraught when her beloved Mr. Kimball, is fired as the county agricultural agent. Out of a job, Kimball (Alvy Moore) no longer has money enough to marry the lady-carpenter-in-waiting! But wait�did he even want to?

programme.title: The Vulgar Ring Story
programme.desc: Lisa weaves the tale of her great, great grandmother, the Queen of the Gypsies, to explain a bizarre family tradition: a woman in her family must marry an American -- but only every fourth generation -- in order to gain a special inheritance.

programme.title: Who's Lisa
programme.desc: After Oliver (Eddie Albert) accidentally drops a hammer on her head, Lisa (Eva Gabor) develops a case amnesia, with no idea who she is or why she is on a farm in Hooterville�and she adamantly refuses to believe that Oliver is her husband!

programme.title: Music To Milk By
programme.desc: Nothing gets done on the Douglas farm when Oliver (Eddie Albert) gifts Eb (Tom Lester) a top-of-the-line radio for his birthday. Letting nothing stop him, Eb (Tom Lester) enters a radio contest...even when Eleanor the cow swallows the radio whole.

programme.title: The Man For The Job
programme.desc: It's a very official third season premiere for Green Acres when the retirement of a state senator leaves Hooterville considering its best candidate for the job. Of course, they turn to their beloved lawyer-come-farmer Oliver Douglas (Eddie Albert).

programme.title: Lisa's Jam Session
programme.desc: Oliver finds himself in a jam after asking Lisa to make him homemade fruit preserves. An episode deliciously devoted to Lisa's culinary escapades, Lisa musters all of her Hungarian might to make Oliver the best peach jam he's ever tasted.

programme.title: Oliver Vs The Phone Company
programme.desc: After years of substandard service, Oliver is hellbent on throwing the book at the Hooterville Phone Company. When it becomes clear that the local utility oversight board can't do much about it, he decides to handle matters directly.

programme.title: Oliver Takes Over The Phone Company
programme.desc: Mr. Trendell, the president of the Hooterville Phone Company, hands the company over to a delighted Oliver. But after a day of crossed wires and a switchboard repairman with some lose connections of his own, Oliver is ready to call it quits.

programme.title: Don't Count Your Tomatoes Before They're Picked
programme.desc: For the first time, Oliver has a successful crop that needs picking. His tomatoes have grown beautifully. But matters at the phone company continue divide his precious time, so Oliver looks for an interested buyer to take the company off his hands.

programme.title: A Kind Word For The President
programme.desc: Being president of the Hooterville Phone Company has been a rude awakening for Oliver. The switchboard operator is now calling him at five in the morning! After a bevy of new complaints from unhappy customers, Oliver has just about had enough.

programme.title: Eb Elopes
programme.desc: One might think that when Eb takes a vacation things around the farm might go more smoothly. But when Eb elopes, leaving his cousin Walter to take his place, it turns out to be a horrible idea. Walter barely knows a weed from a hole in the ground!

programme.title: The Thing
programme.desc: Lisa is reminded that she stored a birthday present for Oliver years ago: a genuine Stavinsky. But what is it? It's a modern art sculpture that is two parts plumbing pipes, one part tire chains, and one part birdbath. Oliver calls it "The Thing."

programme.title: Das Lumpen
programme.desc: The continually evolving story of how Lisa (Eva Gabor) and Oliver (Oliver) fell in love gets yet another version in this delightful episode. But one thing is for sure: Lisa and Oliver are just as in love today as the day when he fell out of the sky.

programme.title: Jealousy, English Style
programme.desc: Green Acres is greener than ever, with jealousy. When Oliver (Eddie Albert) hires a handsome, young, intelligent Brit to take over his farm work while he is away, it doesn't take long for the newcomer to make a strong impression on Lisa (Eva Gabor).

programme.title: Haney's New Image
programme.desc: Mr. Haney is up to his money-making schemes again. When a government representative tells Mr. Haney that the state is looking to purchase the Douglas farm for a new highway, Mr. Haney arranges to buy back the farm from the Douglases at a steal.

programme.title: Alf And Ralph Break Up
programme.desc: Ralph, the lady carpenter, runs away from home and stays with the Douglases after having a fight with her brother, Alf. While Oliver may never get his bedroom finished, he gains a maid as Ralph takes over as the Douglases' live-in housekeeper.

programme.title: New Neighbors Meet The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: Wednesday Leaves Home
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family Meets The V.I.P.'s
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: Morticia, The Matchmaker
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: Lurch Learns To Dance
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion, after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: Art And The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family Meets A Beatnik
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family Meets The Undercover Man
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: Mother Lurch Visits The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: Uncle Fester's Illness
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she an Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family Splurges
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: Cousin Itt Visits The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family In Court
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: Amnesia In The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: Thing Is Missing
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: Crisis In The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: Lurch And His Harpsicord
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: BuzzFeed Unsolved: Elisa Lam, Black Dahlia, Tupac, Biggie
programme.desc: Conspiracy theory enthusiast Ryan deep-dives into mysteries surrounding notorious unsolved crimes, in order to convince his dubious friend Shane that, sometimes, the evidence isn’t always as it seems.

programme.title: The Terrifying Axeman of New Orleans
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane explore one of the bloodiest chapters in New Orleans history.

programme.title: The Mysterious Death Of The Boy In The Box

programme.title: The Tragic Murder Of JonBenét Ramsey
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane discuss the details surround the death of JonBenet Ramsey.

programme.title: The Odd Vanishing of Amelia Earhart
programme.desc: What truly happened to the Amelia Earhart?

programme.title: The Creepy Murder In Room 1046
programme.desc: What really happened to this mystery man?

programme.title: The Strange Drowning of Natalie Wood
programme.desc: Did Natalie Wood really drown?

programme.title: The Mysterious Poisoned Pill Murders & The Disturbing Murders at Keddie Cabin
programme.desc: Johnson & Johnson has since introduced safety measures which have set the industry standard and Ryan and Shane tackle a fresh case in the remote forests of Northern California.

programme.title: The Suspicious Assasination of JFK
programme.desc: It's the most infamous American crime.

programme.title: The Grisly Murders of Jack The Ripper
programme.desc: In this season premiere, Ryan and Shane finally take on the most infamous serial killer of all time.

programme.title: Living with Confidence & Going All In
programme.desc: Expect to learn why Matthew says life often “rhymes”, why it’s okay if you do everything right and still not get the result you want, how Matthew views the role courage plays in his life, how to learn to deal with failure, the difference between a nice guy and a good man, the most important principle Matthew refuses to compromise on, the appropriate balance of running toward a life you want vs. away from one that you fear, how to balance self-confidence with humility, the difference between “being” and “acting”, what it means to be more impressed with the wow instead of the how, rumors on Matthew’s return to the True Detective franchise, and much more…

programme.title: How To Find Direction When Nothing Feels Right
programme.desc: From 6× Mr. Olympia to full-time business owner and stay-at-home dad, it’s safe to say Chris Bumstead’s been enjoying retired life. So what’s he been up to this past year, what’s changed most for him, and what’s he looking forward to next? Expect to learn how retirement is going for Cbum, if Cbum would have retired last year even if he didn’t win, how Chris learned to sit and process his emotions, if Cbum regrets retirement and if he misses the competing yet, how Chris plans on leveling up for baby Bumstead number two, he hardest part of losing that “Mr. Olympia structure” in daily life, if Chris ever plans on returning the stage again, and much more…

programme.title: Comforting Truths About Human Nature
programme.desc: How can we truly understand ourselves? Most of us either ignore our emotions or overthink them, turning simple feelings into complex puzzles. So how do we navigate the minefield of emotion to grow and become better? Expect to learn where self-esteem really comes from, why criticism hurts so much, where imposter syndrome comes from and how to overcome it, if hustle culture is a modern phenomenon or is this something new, why we tend to intellectualise our emotions, why we have existential crisis’ and how to navigate them, why online dating is so miserable for so many people and much more…
